name: Trading & Distribution
summary: The core instrumentation-trading vertical: RFQ -> costing -> offer -> order -> GRN -> invoice -> payment, with supplier procurement, multi-division branding, and Bahrain VAT e-invoicing. This is the reference overlay that proves the 'company facts are configuration, not code' thesis.

justification_filters.roi_proof: Replaces manual Excel costing, quotation typing, and per-division branding lookups; enforces margin/approval policy automatically.
justification_filters.workflow_closure: Operator runs an RFQ through costing, reviews margin/risk warnings, approves or declines, exports a branded quotation, and the offer flows to order -> invoice -> payment with a full audit trail.

overlay_configuration.active_accessor: overlay.Active() / overlay.SetActive() (synced from package-main activeOverlay at startup)
overlay_configuration.cascade: overlay.json from exe dir > data/ > app-data dir; falls back to BuiltinDefaults() (never nil; offline-first)

engines.name: costing_engine
responsibilities: risk assessment + approval status (overlay business rules)

engines.name: geometry_bridge
responsibilities: tender evaluation (named-competitor margin floor from overlay)

domain_services.name: costing / offer / order surface
responsibilities: calculate costing (assessCostingRisk uses overlay business rules)

domain_services.name: einvoice_service
responsibilities: supplier identity dispatched per invoice.Division via overlay (fixed the per-division TRN bug in 2b)

storage_adapters.name: gorm sqlite (ncruces, no CGO)
storage_adapters.division_default: overlay-driven at write time via normalizeDivisionName("") and divisionDefaultSQLLiteral() (no hardcoded GORM/DDL default as of Phase 2d)

publishes: finance.invoice.created (subscribers exist; production PUBLISHERS pending Phase 3)
events.note: Event bus has subscribers but zero production publishers today — wiring publishers is Mission B / Phase 3.

policies.invariant_suite: business_invariants.go (AllInvariants: grading, payment terms, discounts, product margins, risk/approval, financial) + ValidateCostingApproval
policies.financial_semantics: SACRED — margin floors, grade terms, rounding, posting order, VAT are stop-and-ask; Phase 2c relocated values byte-identically only

out_of_scope_or_follow_up: full overlays/trading/ domain-package move (workflow code still in package main)
division-SET / alias enumeration -> generate from overlay.Divisions (SQL IN-lists, banking alias switch, validDivisions maps, Acme-vs-Beacon breakdowns)
branding/identity strings (report titles, contract T&C text, companyName setting default) -> overlay display name
EUR->BHD exchange-rate inconsistency (0.41 eh_parser vs 0.45 live) — financial decision pending Commander

maturity.notes: Company facts (identity, division profiles, business rules, product markup, division defaults) are now overlay configuration (Phase 2a-2d). The trading WORKFLOW code still lives in package main; promoting it into overlays/trading/ and generic capabilities (document numbering, approval routing, PDF assembly) into pkg/ engines is a later wave (Phase 2f / Mission A continuation).
